jobs.title: AI Manager, Compliance Systems
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Gusto</strong></p><p>At Gusto, we&#39;re on a mission to grow the small business economy. We handle the hard stuff — payroll, health insurance, 401(k)s, and HR — so owners can focus on their craft and their customers.</p><ul><li>Build AI-powered compliance systems for Gusto&rsquo;s Corporate Compliance team</li></ul></div>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Embedded Payroll
jobs.content: <p>Build the Gusto Embedded payroll API that thousands of vertical-SaaS partners run on Gusto&rsquo;s ledger — the W-2 / W-4 / 1099-NEC engine, the 401(k) deduction pipeline, and the audit-trail generator the payroll-ops team opens every Friday.</p>
